Thriller.name: Paul Bacon
Thriller.description: Paul Bacon — designer of the Jaws, Catch-22, The Other, and Rosemary's Baby covers.

Science Fiction.name: Chesley Bonestell
Science Fiction.description: Chesley Bonestell — painter of the Astounding Science Fiction covers and The Conquest of Space.

Mystery.name: Tom Adams
Mystery.description: Tom Adams — painter of the Agatha Christie Fontana paperback covers of the 1960s–70s.

Adventure.name: N.C. Wyeth
Adventure.description: N.C. Wyeth — painter of the Scribner's Classics covers (Treasure Island, Kidnapped, The Last of the Mohicans).

Comedy.name: Edward Gorey
Comedy.description: Edward Gorey — designer of the Anchor Books and Doubleday paperback covers.

Horror.name: Don Brautigam
Horror.description: Don Brautigam — painter of the Stephen King covers of the 1980s (The Stand, It, Misery).

Fantasy.name: Michael Whelan
Fantasy.description: Michael Whelan — painter of the Thomas Covenant, Pern, and Tad Williams covers.

Literary.name: Andrew Wyeth
Literary.description: Andrew Wyeth — painter (Christina's World, the Helga pictures).

Historical Fiction.name: Ilya Repin
Historical Fiction.description: Ilya Repin — Russian Realist painter (Ivan the Terrible and His Son Ivan, Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks).

Myth & Folk Tale.name: Arthur Rackham
Myth & Folk Tale.description: Arthur Rackham — illustrator of Grimm's Fairy Tales, Andersen, and Wagner's Ring.
